Planner

DashboardStudy BuilderRoadmapCourse Manager

Semester Systems v1.0

Course Manager

Add and manage your courses for the semester.

Global Settings

Course statuses (Completed, In Progress, Planned) are calculated automatically based on this.

Backup & Restore

Export your current plan or load an existing one.

Danger Zone

Revert mistakes or reset curriculum entirely.

Add New Course

Check this if this course is a "pool" meant to collect CP from smaller sub-courses. Child modules can select this as their parent.

Grades are used to calculate your average current grade.
